## 🔧 Implementation Notes

### Building the Union Patient List
```
Unique PAD Patient Set =
  UNION of all Patient.id values from:
    Bundles returned by Queries 1–12

```

### Refining Aspirin & Atorvastatin Results (Queries 10, 12)
Because aspirin and atorvastatin are broadly prescribed, apply a post-filter:
```
Aspirin/Atorvastatin patients WHERE:
  Patient.id EXISTS IN (Queries 1–9 patient set)
  → Confirmed PAD patient on antiplatelet/statin
```
This cross-reference is your **antiplatelet adherence denominator**.

### Pagination
For large populations, handle bundle pagination:
```
GET [base]/Condition?code=...&_count=200
→ Follow Bundle.link[rel="next"] until exhausted
```

### Optional Filters You Can Add
| Goal | Parameter to Add |
|---|---|
| Confirmed diagnoses only | `&verification-status=confirmed` |
| Exclude resolved conditions | `&clinical-status=active` *(already included)* |
| Active + on-hold meds | Change `status=active` → `status=active,on-hold` |
| Include historical meds | Change `status=active` → `status=active,completed` |
| Specific date range | `&date=ge2024-01-01` (Condition) or `&authoredon=ge2024-01-01` (MedicationRequest) |

### SNOMED Code Verification
Always validate SNOMED codes against your SNOMED CT version at:
`https://browser.ihtsdotools.org`
